fields.name: name
fields.label: Full Name / Preferred Name
fields.placeholder: Your name as known in this community

fields.name: discord
fields.label: Discord Username
fields.placeholder: e.g. username or @username

fields.name: age
fields.label: Age
fields.placeholder: How old are you?

fields.name: timezone
fields.label: Timezone
fields.placeholder: e.g. GMT+8, EST, AEST

fields.name: tenure
fields.label: How long have you been in this server?
fields.placeholder: e.g. 2 weeks, 3 months, since the beginning

fields.name: timezone
fields.label: Timezone & When You're Usually Available
fields.placeholder: e.g. GMT+8, available after 4pm on weekdays

fields.name: exp
fields.label: Relevant experience
fields.placeholder: Have you helped moderate or manage any Discord server, group chat, school club, sports team, or anything similar? Describe what you did and what you learned. No experience? That's okay — explain why you'd still be great for this role.

fields.name: conflict
fields.label: Handling a conflict
fields.placeholder: Tell us about a time you helped calm down or resolve a disagreement or argument — in this server, another server, at school, or anywhere else. What happened, how did you handle it, and what was the result?

fields.name: exp
fields.label: Relevant experience
fields.placeholder: Have you helped moderate or manage any Discord server, group chat, school club, or anything like that? Tell us what you did. No experience? That's fine — just describe qualities that make you a good fit instead.

fields.name: approach
fields.label: How you handle rule-breaking
fields.placeholder: If a member is breaking the rules, how do you handle it in a way that's fair? How do you stay consistent even when the person is someone you know?

fields.name: philosophy
fields.label: How would you lead a staff team?
fields.placeholder: How would you make sure staff work well together? How would you handle it if a staff member isn't doing their job, or if you disagree with another Head Admin?

fields.name: vision
fields.label: What would you improve about this server?
fields.placeholder: Give specific ideas — new channels, events, rules, systems, or changes you'd actually push for. Be realistic about what's achievable.

fields.name: scenario
fields.label: Your response
fields.placeholder: Walk through exactly what you would do, step by step. Think about how it affects everyone involved and how you'd communicate what you did.

fields.name: statement
fields.label: Why do you want to be this role, and why should we pick you?
fields.placeholder: Tell us what motivates you to apply, what makes you a good fit, and what you'd bring to the team. Don't just say 'I'll do my best' — be specific.

fields.name: puzzle
fields.label: Your answer
fields.placeholder: Enter your answer in a single word or short phrase.

fields.name: contribution
fields.label: What smart, interesting, or creative things have you contributed to this server?
fields.placeholder: Give specific examples — conversations you started, knowledge you shared, things you made, problems you solved, or ways you've helped other members. Vague answers like 'I'm active and smart' will not be accepted.

fields.name: event_exp
fields.label: Have you helped with or hosted any events before?
fields.placeholder: Any experience counts — online events, school events, group games, trivia nights, anything. No experience? That's fine, just tell us why you'd be good at it.

fields.name: event_ideas
fields.label: Give us 2–3 event ideas you'd run if selected
fields.placeholder: Be specific — what's the event, how does it work, and why would people enjoy it? Could be trivia, game tournaments, watch-alongs, challenges, anything creative.

fields.name: motivation
fields.label: Why do you want to be on the event staff team?
fields.placeholder: Tell us why you're interested and what you'd bring. Be genuine.

fields.name: availability
fields.label: When are you generally available?
fields.placeholder: e.g. weekday evenings after school, weekends, most afternoons

declarations.text: I confirm that everything I wrote in this application is true and accurate.
I understand that lying or exaggerating in my application will result in it being rejected and may lead to further action.
I agree to follow all server rules and treat everyone with respect if my application is accepted.
I understand that this role comes with real responsibility and I will take it seriously, not just treat it as a status symbol.
I understand that as Head Admin I need to be consistently fair, available, and accountable — including when my friends are involved.
